items.title: venv & virtualenv
items.description: Activate a virtual environment first, then pip install into it so dependencies stay isolated.

items.title: Lockfiles & Reproducibility
items.description: requirements.txt with == is a basic lock; dedicated lockfiles add hashes and full transitive pinning.

items.title: Poetry
items.description: Poetry manages dependencies via pyproject.toml and its own lockfile instead of requirements.txt.
